text: <par>STC surmises (p.185) that the Kanauri forms arose through reduplication. Cf. Northern Lisu <latinform>gu³⁵gu³³</latinform>.</par>

<par>Kanauri regularly develops a cluster <latinform>st-</latinform> from the PTB sequence <latinform>*sn-</latinform>, see HPTB:103. The <latinform>-i-</latinform> vocalism of Kanauri <latinform>ṣṭiṅ</latinform> is probably explicable in terms of the widespread TB variational pattern of <latinform>*-u- ⪤ -i-</latinform>, cf. HPTB:493-505.</par>
